contractText:
FREELANCE WEB DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into as of January 15, 2026, between Oakridge Digital LLC ("Client"), a Delaware limited liability company with offices at 450 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10022, and Marcus Chen ("Developer"), an independent contractor located at 78 Willow Street, Brooklyn, NY 11201.

1. SCOPE OF WORK
Developer shall design and develop a responsive e-commerce website for Client using React and Next.js, consisting of: (a) Home page with featured products; (b) Product catalog with search and filtering (up to 200 SKUs); (c) Shopping cart and Stripe checkout integration; (d) Customer account dashboard; (e) Admin panel for product management. The complete technical specification is attached as Exhibit A.

2. PROJECT TIMELINE
The project shall commence on February 1, 2026, with final delivery on or before April 30, 2026. Milestone dates: Wireframes by Feb 15; Design mockups by Mar 1; Development by Apr 15; QA and launch by Apr 30.

3. COMPENSATION
Total project fee: $18,500 USD, payable as follows:
- 30% deposit ($5,550) due upon signing this Agreement
- 30% ($5,550) upon approval of design mockups
- 40% ($7,400) upon final delivery and acceptance
All invoices are payable within 14 days (Net-14) of receipt.

4. REVISIONS
Client is entitled to two (2) rounds of revisions per milestone at no additional cost. Additional revisions shall be billed at Developer's standard hourly rate of $125/hour. Each revision round shall be clearly documented in writing.

5. KILL FEE AND TERMINATION
Either party may terminate this Agreement with 14 days written notice. In the event of termination by Client, Developer shall be compensated for all work completed to date plus a kill fee of 15% of the remaining project balance. If the project is terminated after the design phase, the deposit is non-refundable.

6. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
Upon receipt of final payment in full, all intellectual property rights, including source code, designs, and assets created specifically for this project, shall transfer to Client. Developer retains the right to display the work in their portfolio and case studies. Developer retains ownership of pre-existing tools, libraries, and frameworks used.

7. CONFIDENTIALITY
Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of proprietary information shared during the course of this project for a period of two (2) years following completion.

8. LIABILITY
Developer's total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the total amount paid by Client. Neither party shall be liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages.

9. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
Any disputes arising under this Agreement shall first be submitted to mediation in New York County. If mediation fails, disputes shall be resolved by binding arbitration under the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

10. GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

Oakridge Digital LLC: _________________________
Marcus Chen: _________________________
